creator: mark.voltz@gmail.com
text:
HAL doesn't load after installation.  DBUS is loaded/running.  It appears to be looking for an old libcam file.

output:

f9# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/hald start
Starting hald.
f9# Shared object "libcam.so.5" not found, required by "hald"
f9# locate libcam.so
/lib/libcam.so.6
/usr/lib/libcam.so
/usr/lib32/libcam.so
/usr/lib32/libcam.so.6

How-To-Repeat: pkg_add -r hal
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/hald
